title: The Zenith State: Maturity and Completeness
overview: The architectural goal of the Language Atlas—a state where all referenced languages, people, and concepts have complete, high-density profiles.
historical_context: A term coined to describe the transition from an "Alpha" prototype to a production-grade research tool.
mental_model: A library where every cited work is available on the shelf.
key_innovations: Automated "Dark Matter" detection to track progress.
Strict data-completeness requirements for new entries.
tradeoffs: Requires significant ongoing research and documentation effort to reach and maintain.
legacy: The guiding vision for the Language Atlas development lifecycle.
ai_assisted_discovery_missions: Check the current status of the Dark Matter Audit.
Identify the remaining steps to reach the Zenith state for the "early" generation.
